name: Pendulumucho
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if this card was activated this turn: You can target 1 of your Pendulum Monsters, that is banished or in your GY, except "Pendulumucho"; add it to your Extra Deck face-up.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 face-up Level 1 Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck, except "Pendulumucho", but banish it when it leaves the field.
pend_eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if this card was activated this turn: You can target 1 of your Pendulum Monsters, that is banished or in your GY, except "Pendulumucho"; add it to your Extra Deck face-up.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 face-up Level 1 Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck, except "Pendulumucho", but banish it when it leaves the field.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 face-up Level 1 Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck, except "Pendulumucho", but banish it when it leaves the field.

action: Adds from Graveyard to Extra Deck
Adds banished cards to the Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes other cards when they leave the field
